zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Plaiz於1367年出生在英國諾福爾可時，她的父親Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte24歲，母親Joan Stapleton16歲。她於1378年與Sir John Howard在英國英格蘭諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 瑪麗 馮 維金結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1391年8月在英國英格蘭諾福爾可維廷 哥吉拉 沙智 煙雨 聖 瑪麗享年24歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可維廷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Plaiz于1367年出生在英国諾福爾可时，她的父亲Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte24岁，母亲Joan Stapleton16岁。她于1378年与Sir John Howard在英国英格兰諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 瑪麗 馮 維金结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1391年8月在英国英格兰諾福爾可維廷 哥吉拉 沙智 煙雨 聖 瑪麗享年24岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可維廷。

nameMeanings.name: Plaiz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Rainer.
South German (Swabia): nickname for a clumsy person, a variant of dialect Plantsch.

variants.name: Pflanz
meanings: South German: topographic name denoting someone who lived by or owned a plantation, from Middle High German pflanze ‘plant’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Plaiz was born in 1367, in Norfolk, England, her father, Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte, was 24 and her mother, Joan Stapleton, was 16. She married Sir John Howard in 1378, in Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in August 1391, in Weeting All Saints with St Mary, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 24, and was buried in Weeting, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Plaiz est née en 1367, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan Stapleton, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Howard en 1378, à Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en août 1391, à Weeting All Saints with St Mary, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterrée à Weeting, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Plaiz 1367 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte 24 und ihre Mutter Joan Stapleton 16. Sie hat 1378 in Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Sir John Howard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im August 1391 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Weeting All Saints with St Mary, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Weeting, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Plaiz è nata il nel 1367 nel Norfolk, England, sua padre, Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Joan Stapleton, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Howard nel 1378, nel Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel agosto 1391, nel Weeting All Saints with St Mary, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 24 anni, e fu sepolta a Weeting, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Plaizが1367年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Baron John de Plaiz of Tofteは24歳，母Joan Stapletonは16歳であった。1378年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウィグジェンハル スト マリー ス バージンでSir John Howardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1391年8月にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウィーティング アル サインツ ウィス スト マリーで24歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクウィーティングにて埋葬された。

ko.Weeting, Thetford, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 위틴그 앨 세인츠 위스 스트 메리
ko.Wiggenhall, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 위겐홀 스트 메리 테 버긴
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Plaiz(이)가 1367년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Stapleton(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 위겐홀 스트 메리 테 버긴에서 Sir John Howard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1391년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 위틴그 앨 세인츠 위스 스트 메리에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 위틴그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Plaiz nasceu em 1367, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan Stapleton, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Howard em 1378, em Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1391, em Weeting All Saints with St Mary, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 24 anos, e foi sepultada em Weeting, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Weeting, Thetford, Norfolk, England: витинг алл сеинц вит ст мэри, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Wiggenhall, Norfolk, England: вигенолл ст мэри т виргин, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Plaiz родилась в 1367 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Stapleton, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Howard в 1378 г. в местности вигенолл ст мэри т виргин, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла август 1391 г. в местности витинг алл сеинц вит ст мэри, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 24 лет и была похоронена в местности витинг, норфолк, Англия.
